steps.instruction: Scroll down until you see the listing "https://api2.branch.io/v1/install"
Check if you see "hardware_id", if so continue with next step, else fail the test.
Check if you see "is_hardware_id_real", if so continue with next step, else fail the test.
Check if you see "initial_referrer", if so continue with next step, else fail the test.
Check if you see "install_referrer_extras", if so continue with next step, else fail the test.
Check if you see "advertising_ids", if so continue with next step, else fail the test.
Check if you see "lat_val", if so continue with next step, else fail the test.
